subject: Marie Ange Blaise
summary: Haitian woman died of cardiovascular disease after 72 days in ICE custody at for-profit facility. Family alleges medical neglect after chest pain complaints; witnesses report 23-28 minute emergency response delay. ICE claims medication non-compliance.

victim_details.name: Marie Ange Blaise
victim_details.location_of_death: Broward Transitional Center, Pompano Beach, Florida
